vehicle_class: Wheeled tactical vehicle (FMTV M1140 truck frame)
payload_per_pod: 6 GMLRS rockets, or 1 ATACMS missile, or 2 PrSM missiles
operator: United States Army, Marine Corps, allied nations
notable_use_in_ukraine: Deployed June 2022; struck command posts, ammunition depots; ~36 systems in UA service as of 2025 with 4 destroyed
notes: M30A1 alternate-warhead is the cluster-effect round used in counter-battery missions; flight time ~95s at max range.
